title: rubus × marcailhoanus
intro: Rubus × marcailhoanus, also known as the Marcailhoanus hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis species. It is a deciduous shrub that has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × marcailhoanus include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. It can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
